# Zynovax

> Zynovax is an integrated brand growth agency headquartered in Chennai, India. We engineer connected systems — visual identity, social media management, and performance marketing — that scale revenue predictably for ambitious enterprises across the globe.

## Services

- **Visual Identity** — Premium logo systems, brand guidelines, and visual consistency engineered for trust and recognition.
- **Social Media Management** — Performance-led social media management with content strategy, community building, and lead generation.
- **Performance Marketing** — Paid acquisition engines on Google and Meta, engineered for qualified pipeline and compounding ROAS.

## Markets Served

- India (Primary — Chennai HQ)
- United States
- Canada
- Australia
- United Kingdom
- United Arab Emirates

## Contact

- Website: https://www.zynovax.in

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/zynovax
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/zynovax

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2025
- Type: Integrated Brand Growth Agency
- Engagements: 120+
- Client revenue influenced: $210M+
- Average ROI: 4.3×
- Countries served: 6+
